reviews.comment:
Bien precio, buena atención pero con la calle lateral rota, un kilombo llegar al surtidor

(Translated by Google)
Good price, good service, but the side street is broken, making it a real hassle to get to the gas station.

reviews.comment:
Le dije al playero que pagaba con aplicación bancaria antes de cargar el tanque. Luego de cargarlo me dijo que solo la app YPF funcionaba, ni siquiera mercado pago. Y tampoco no me cargaron los puntos correspondientes

(Translated by Google)
I told the beach attendant I was paying with a banking app before filling up. After filling up, he told me only the YPF app worked, not even Mercado Pago. And they didn't charge me the corresponding points either.

Sir, I gave it a bad rating by mistake, I got the gas station wrong, here I am editing my opinion, my apologies.

reviews.comment:
Siempre que puedo cargo ahi!. Nunca encontre el sistema de carga de aire de neumáticos rota!. Los muchachos que atienden son una maravilla de respetuosos!. Muy limpio siempre!. Un lujo de estacion!!

(Translated by Google)
I fill up there whenever I can! I've never found the tire inflation system broken! The guys who serve are wonderfully respectful! Always very clean! A luxury station!
